creator: destination_wellknown
caption:
You won’t regret this 👌🏴󠁧󠁢󠁳󠁣󠁴󠁿

Don’t get me wrong, I love Edinburgh and I think you can spend a good amount of time in the Scottish capital 🤝

But I also think Scotland is one of the most underrated travel destinations in Europe so it’s a massive shame when I hear Americans who are coming over to Scotland and only experience Edinburgh when there’s so much more to see 🏴󠁧󠁢󠁳󠁣󠁴󠁿

#scotlandtravel #lovegreatbritain #edinburgh #scottishhighlands

transcription.text: This is the worst mistake you can make if you plan on visiting Scotland. This comes from someone who used to live in Edinburgh where I ran a travel agency and customized trips to Scotland. So we all know that Edinburgh is one of the most beautiful cities in Europe and Glasgow is, in my opinion, one of the top three best cities to live in in the UK. But you're making a massive mistake if you're coming to Scotland and don't venture out of the cities. You can go on day trips every day from Edinburgh and Glasgow and these tours will take you to the highlands where you can enjoy some of the most beautiful nature in the world. It's only like an hour's drive and then you'll reach the highlands while your driver talks you through the exciting history of Scotland. And you can just chill and take in the beauty of places such as Loch Lomond, Glencoe, the Glenfinnan Viaduct and, yes, Loch Ness.
